use_cases: Action button for pricing plan selection and upgrades
Navigation trigger within pricing module UI
Interactive element for subscription management interfaces
CTA button for checkout and conversion flows
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes designed for pricing module interfaces. Features subtle shadow effects and standard hover states with accessibility-focused focus-visible outlines. Part of the Ruixen.UI design system, optimized for SaaS and e-commerce pricing pages requiring consistent action buttons.
